title: Map<string, number>
description: Root `Map<string, number>`. JSON serializes the map to an array of `[key, value]` entry pairs via `Array.from(v)` and restores it with `new Map(v)`; string keys and number values are atomic so no per-entry transform runs. Binary writes a uint32 size prefix followed by encoded entries.
notes: Map round-trips as a JSON array of [key, value] pairs (insertion order preserved), rehydrated to a Map on decode.
